prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its walls and ceiling showing signs of age and neglect. The once-white surfaces are now cracked and peeling, revealing darker layers beneath, with patches of rust staining the lower sections. A series of rusty, metal barriers lines the right side of the walkway, standing on cracked concrete slabs. Small tufts of green weeds push through the broken pavement, adding a touch of life to the otherwise desolate scene. Fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a dim, cool glow that highlights the textures of the crumbling walls and the uneven floor. As the perspective moves forward, the corridor reveals more of its length, with the barriers continuing into the distance. In the far background, a set of stairs and an old, abandoned arcade machine become visible, hinting at a past life for this forgotten space. The camera continues to advance, bringing the viewer deeper into the quiet, abandoned hallway.
